title: Peekaboo discovery — full landing + dashboard at 4 AM
html:
4-AM capture of Peekaboo — an AI-visibility SaaS that does basically what Yahir sketched as insight ai the night before. Landing pitches "Are you showing up in AI?" with website-URL analyzer, then a sample dashboard for Slack scoring 75/100, top citation opportunities (en.wikipedia.org, techradar.com), AI traffic estimates (~9,500 monthly visitors, -4%), and competitor traffic for Zoom / Microsoft Teams / Google Chat / Discord. "Trusted by 3,000+ users" with logos like Panasonic, Atlas, Intellibright.

TL;DR

  • peekaboo is the productized version of insight ai — same AI-visibility-score + competitor-benchmark + LLM-citation-tracking pitch Yahir sketched the day before.
  • Dashboard concretely shows Slack vs Zoom/Teams/Google Chat/Discord traffic estimates from LLM citations — proof the metric Yahir wanted to sell already exists as a measurable.
  • Trusted-by row (Panasonic, Atlas, Intellibright, WireX, websem, chordis) suggests Peekaboo is past traction — Yahir is now studying a working competitor, not a market gap.
  • Set up the next four screenshots (Oct 28 pricing, Oct 29 GEO-SEO variant, Oct 31 founder bios) as Yahir digesting peekaboo in detail.

peekaboo · insight ai · aeo agency · ai search optimization · ai visibility engine · competitor research aeo · yahir thesis ai search 2022 2026
